name: EVA Benchmark
description: Comprehensive evaluation framework for pathology foundation models on patch-level classification tasks.

name: HEST Benchmark
description: Histopathology embeddings and spatial transcriptomics benchmark for whole-slide image analysis.

name: PLISM Benchmark
description: Pathology foundation model evaluation on linear probing tasks across multiple tissue types.

name: PathBench
description: Benchmarking suite for pathology models on whole-slide image classification and survival prediction.

name: Stanford TissueNet
description: Cell and tissue segmentation benchmark for pathology image analysis.
